spec_match.rationale: Beautifully highlights the performance difference between the two pipelines by rendering identical animated scenes side by side and logging simulated vs actual execution stats.

interactive.rationale: Interactive via live performance logging dials, dynamically updating canvases, and fully fluid window scaling support.

edge_cases.rationale: Exceptional Canvas 2D simulation fallback that preserves both the layout side-by-side rendering and simulated stats dials.

references.rationale: Cites the correct ChromeStatus reference link in the parent index.html.

design_system.rationale: Adheres cleanly to the design system.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus reference link on concept page
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must cite the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link directly. Add the ChromeStatus entry link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5199437611794432) to the 'see also' section.
